description:
BOOTY PICS BELOW😝⬇️⬇️

There we go... You know, funny thing is that Xaxrla is actually a bot creator, and made some decent bots... You should check them out, though: https://janitorai.com/profiles/5ba98375-9c0c-4add-ab0d-b88b172337cf_profile-of-xaxrla

So, I don't wanna talk, because I have announced a new event for this year, and this new era... It involve with Scooge.

Oooh, we (yes, we: you and me) are eating good next week: It’s Scooge Week!!! The event will start at 1/12, and end at 1/16. There will be 5 bots, and 2 bonus. These are the list of bots that will be released for the event:

The Sentinel

Tanner Lee "Annie" Revuelta

Cleo

Filk & Madison [ft. SojuSparks]

Tanner & Riley [ft. SojuSparks]

Riley [ft. SojuSparks] (solo version/BONUS)

??? (BONUS/C.AI EXCLUSIVE)

Want the lineup? Here y'all go:
